title: rendererInfo accuracy + hygiene tidy

stories.title: **RENDERER-info-autoReset** ✅ — `__agf.rendererInfo().drawCalls` reported `1` for shadows-bench despite the scene having 300+ meshes.
stories.summary: Root cause: `WebGLRenderer.info` resets its counters at the start of every `.render()` call, and the EffectComposer (FXAA + OutputPass in shadows-bench) issues 3 render passes per frame — so the values we read after composer.render() reflected only the final OutputPass, a single full-screen quad. Disabled `device.info.autoReset` + reset manually at the start of `draw()` so counters accumulate across every pass. shadows-bench now reports `drawCalls: 194, triangles: 70 274`.
verification: legacy import — see sprint notes[] for the original sprint-level verification

notes: Verification: `npm run typecheck` ✅; `npm run test` ✅ — 433 tests; Live probe shadows-bench: `drawCalls: 194` (was `1`), `triangles: 70 274` (was `1`), zero page errors.
